hotel_name: Hampton Inn by Hilton Long Island City New York

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Nothing
reviews.negatives: The AC wasn't working

reviews.title: Disappointing for a Best Western property and the standard that implies.
reviews.negatives: The AC was not working when I checked in, and when I went downstairs to have someone help me adjust it the "maintenance" was clearly a younger brother of the family who could not communicate clearly and just turned it all the way down entirely. The mattress and carpet had massive rust colored stains that were remnants of blood, the countertops and ceilings had been patched, and when I got hot water going in the shower the whole room began to smell of burning and the pipes/ walls themselves started creaking? Bad service, bad room, bad renovation efforts. Was very happy to leave first thing in the morning. I would discourage anyone from staying here.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: My room had red stains on the sheets and red stains on the floor. The location was unsafe.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Horrible management that doesn’t work with you .

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Photos were not the same as the location. Blood on the ground, dirty everywhere, with what seemed to be bed bugs.  Didn't want to finish my shower. I asked for another room, nothing was available. When I left after that one night, I was unable to receive a refund for the other days.

reviews.title: Highly discourage people from staying here.
reviews.positives: The location was convenient, very close to the train. Important to note its in a developing area so not the safest to walk alone at night. Would recommend ubering to/from locations if you stay here.
reviews.negatives: I was booked for a two-night stay but had to leave after just one night due to the extremely poor conditions of the room. The space was visibly dirty and unclean, and to make matters worse, there were roaches or large insects that resembled roaches in the room. This made me feel incredibly uncomfortable and unsafe. Unfortunately, I cannot recommend this place based on my experience.

reviews.title: not a good stay at all. rooms are too small and they do not clean them well
reviews.positives: breakfast
reviews.negatives: the room was not clean, no towels we had to call a bunch ofttimes, shower and tub were really gross and it smelled moldy

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Coiffed
reviews.negatives: To much noise

reviews.title: Hotel was decent, but location and noise was terrible.
reviews.positives: The facility itself was cleaned and the staff very polite — nothing to complain about that.
reviews.negatives: I did not like the location. To start with the exit of the Queens subway is very very weird — people at the stairs using drugs, drinking heavily and looking at you as you are about to get robbed. Then, after crossing over this area you have a decent walk around a strange neighborhood — again, you don’t feel safe. We spent five nights at the hotel and there was a very loud music (mix of electronic and Mexican music) playing all over the weekend — at least during the whole time we were at the hotel (e.g.: from 8pm until 8am). Very inconvenient and unpleasant, especially when you just want to relax after a day of exploring the city. T

reviews.title: Place was clean, but the noise made the stay not enjoyable.
reviews.positives: Rooms were clean.
reviews.negatives: The noise.  The doors were paper thin.(windows also)  Could hear doors opening and slamming the whole time.  I believe there was also some construction going on in the building.  Could hear a ton of noise outside as well.

reviews.title: it was okay

reviews.title: Not recommended.

reviews.negatives: The location was terrible. I felt unsafe everyday on my way to the hotel. Also, the breakfast is not good. A lot of unhealthy food.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives:
The air conditioner was broken in our room so we were hot every night. one night they came in and just turned it on and said it was fixed but it wasn’t, was still blowing hot air. the second night he checked the condenser for the floor and it worked for about an hour and started blowing hot air again.

it’s a relatively new hotel so i am sure they are still working out the kinks but i’d stay there again!

reviews.title: Over Priced
reviews.negatives: The advertised price did not match the actual price charged at all.... I would have just booked at a better hotel for the price I was actually charged for the room!

reviews.title: Acceptable

reviews.title: Acceptable

reviews.title: The hotel is slightly underwhelming considering price paid
reviews.positives: Staff was nice room was fairly comfortable.
reviews.negatives: Loud music coming from some club.  Room was small.

reviews.title: Good for emergencies
reviews.positives: I was here for one night due to a canceled flight.  Free breakfast is sugar and bread from Costco.  The shower floor needs to be cleaned better; the floor was brown.  It's nothing around you, so have everything you might think you will need.
reviews.negatives: Brown stains on the carpet, the bad " breakfast"

reviews.title: They have a lot of space for improvements.
reviews.negatives: The location of the hotel. I felt unsafe in my way from the train station to the hotel.

reviews.title: I honestly feel that they need to improve on a lot when it comes to making the stay more comfortable
reviews.positives: The breakfast wasn't what I expected. They served crossaints and bagels. No juice, yogurt, fruit or any other healthy or hot meal options to choose from. Also no parking. Only street parking.
reviews.negatives: The TV's in the room were old and not smart tv's. Good thing I brought my roku with me.

reviews.title: Acceptable

reviews.title: Descent, you get what you pay for.
reviews.positives: The rooms
reviews.negatives: The loud construction in the lobby when trying to check in. Couldn’t hear anything the lady checking us in was trying to tell us.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Location

reviews.title: was okay not good
reviews.positives: nothing except the location
reviews.negatives: they did n ot put enough info at the web so i had to wait an hour extra,  cleaning was terrible for that price

reviews.title: A decent place to lay our heads for a trip to the city, but will look elsewhere in the future.
reviews.positives: It was a ten minute walk from the nearest subway station (F train). There were two elevators. The gym downstairs looks nice, although we forgot there was one onsite—as there is no signage indicating it until you’re right outside its door and staff didn’t mention it upon checking in. Checking in and out went smoothly.
reviews.negatives: Tiny room with nowhere to sit besides the bed—what is the point of having a “desk” are with no chair to sit at the desk? The complementary coffee and pastries were taken down before the end of breakfast on at least one of the days we stayed at the property. We had a very uncomfortable interaction with a woman who claimed to own the hotel and stated that it was “gross” that we were paying to stay there. The shower doors in our bathroom were not very useful, as water leaked out all over the floor despite having the doors closed. There was a tiny insect crawling around my headphones case that I’m 98% wasn’t a bedbug (pictured) but it did cause some alarm. Also, therefore was no refrigerator in the room. There’s a coffee shop set up downstairs but was unattended and didn’t seem to be operational despite having a menu with prices visible.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Hotel is ok. Clean and quiet
reviews.negatives: Location of the hotel is not far from subway but unsafe at night time

reviews.title: Not far from manhattan

Also it didn't bother me but the hotel is just next to a power plant.

reviews.title: Beautiful hotel
reviews.positives: I love the fact that the rooms were so modernly decorated everything you need in a room very comfortable bed TV coffee machine and I’m very clean modern bathroom. The staff that works at the reception were really helpful and positive dated everything they can to help me.🙏🏻
reviews.negatives:
Only thing I can say is the location is not the safest location. There are people on the next block or a block after that they give you uncomfortable vibe.
and it might not be very safe for a woman. If you wanna get back to the hotel at night I would suggest to take Uber or a taxi

reviews.title: Good hotel at a reasonable price.
reviews.positives: The shower has great pressure, no problems with hot water. Elevators are always fast. Staff is friendly and helpful. There's a Target and great dining areas like 20 minutes walking away from the hotel, and feels a lot safer.
reviews.negatives: Area, it's unfortunate that surrounding areas are dark and lonely, by night not only outside the subway, but also in the nearby streets close to the hotel are people that might cause some inconveniences,specially as a woman ( I recommend you don't go alone by night, I saw several women in groups at least of two) once you are away the hotel surroundings everything feels safer ( we love the local food!)

reviews.title: Great Stay with One Issue
reviews.positives: The staff were friendly. Rooms were modern, clean and comfortable. Eating area at the ground floor was nice.
reviews.negatives: The breakfast was meagre, with morning beverages and some pastry, but we intended to have it outside so it didn’t affect our stay too much. The biggest issue was having a loud party next door that went all the way until 1am. I couldn’t sleep so I went to the front desk to complain and the staff told me that many guests and hotels nearby have also complained to the police and it is taking time to sort out. I won’t penalise the hotel for this since its out of control and they were doing their best.

reviews.title: No recomiendo quedarse aquí porque TE ROBAN
reviews.negatives:
Me quedé una semana porque fuimos a Nueva York de vacaciones en el puente de mayo, es decir, acabo de salir. En primer lugar, el hotel no está mal en sí (hablo de lo que son las instalaciones) pero la ubicación está al lado de un guetto con gente poco deseable y un montón de locales para fumar marihuana y a saber qué más. Cada vez que quieres ir para el metro es horrible porque te topas con esta gente y pasas miedo verdaderamente. 
En segundo lugar, yo que vosotros no pediría desayuno porque no hay variedad y está todo bastante malo, los huevos revueltos secos, unas salchichas aplastadas que cambiaban un día a otro de cerdo o de pollo, café aguado y para hacer waffles. No apetece desayunar la verdad.
Por último. Las señoras de la limpieza son unas ladronas. Me robaron unas gafas de sol Rayban en mi habitación. Me encaré con una de ellas llamada Vanesa diciéndoselo en su cara y me lo negaba (evidentemente, si lo ha hecho no me lo va a decir en mi cara), pero lo más grave de todo es que en recepción no me dieron ninguna solución ni se tomó ninguna represalia por parte del hotel a esa sinvergüenza de señora ni mucho menos me dieron a mí ninguna solución de nada. Una vergüenza de hotel y una vergüenza sus trabajadores.
Yo que vosotros si pensáis quedaros aquí de verdad iros a otro lado porque entre los ladrones, las nulas soluciones y los guettos de droga de alrededor de verdad no merece la pena. Merece la pena gastarse un poco más de dinero y evitar este tipo de sitios.

reviews.negatives: Cuando llueve se entra el agua por una de las ventanas, el agua no es muy limpia y no hubo desayuno durante mi estadía.

reviews.title: Excelente relación costo - ubicación (cerca de Manhattan).
reviews.positives: La ubicación, relación calidad precio, y están remodelando por lo que la habitación estaba recién remodelada. Había por lo menos 20 enchufes en la habitación.
reviews.negatives: Al estar en remodelación, había mucho polvo en cierta areas, pero en general muy bien.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Nuestra experiencia fue muy positiva, las habitaciones cómodas y de un buen tamaño para ser NYC, ofrecen bollería y café gratis de 7am a 9am lo cual ayuda a ahorrar. Esta a aproximadamente 5 cuadra de la estación del metro, en la linea M, lo que te pone a 2 paradas de Midtown Manhattan. En el camino de la estación al hotel hay 2 deli/bodega, y en la estación hay Dunkin, Taco Bell y Little Ceasars.
reviews.negatives: El hotel  está siendo remodelado, no fue un gran problema para nosotros pero vale la pena mencionarlo. El área esta en construcción y aunque hay una gran cantidad de hoteles, es algo solitario, en especial de noche. Sin embargo si vas en grupo o caminas rápido y consciente de tu entorno no debería haber problema, sin embargo nosotros si decidimos llamar un Uber de la estación una noche que regresamos tarde, y un hombre nos estaba vigilando, pero aun si decide usar Uber no es tan caro pues esta muy cerca de Manhattan.. En general lo recomendaría sin problema y me quedaría de nuevo aquí.

reviews.title: Very good

reviews.negatives: Lo único malo es la zona, se siente algo inseguro el camino del metro al hotel. Pero nada malísimo tampoco. Eso sí, pagar menos te hace tener que moverte en metro para ir a los sitios turísticos.

reviews.title: Semana de vacaciones en Nedia Hotel
reviews.positives:
La buena atención y amabilidad del personal, siempre te recibian con un saludo y una sonrisa solo que por el idioma no pude interactuar como lo hubiera querido. 

La habitación cuenta con tetera/cafetera, hielera pequeña (no cuenta con refrigerador), tabla y plancha, caja fuerte, enchufes usb para cargar celular así que no se requiere llevar enchufe adaptador.

La habitación es espaciosa y la cama es super confortable. Las almohadas y ropa de cama ayudan mucho para tener un buen dormir (mucho mejor que en mi casa... jajjaja). El baño muy agradable y con la temperatura ideal de agua en la ducha y con un buen secador de pelo (en 5 minutos tenía seco mi cabello) y la habitación se limpiaba diariamente.

En el piso inferior hay un microondas, vasos, set de cubiertos de plástico y agua con hielo para usar sin costo, también tienen para comprar desayuno durante la mañana (por los valores compraba afuera) y una máquina expendedora.

En mi habitación daba a una terraza y justo una noche había una lata que con ruido que hacia al moverse con el viento no dejaba dormir pero a la mañana siguiente lo comenté en recepción y al llegar a la noche ya la habían retirado.

Me dieron la oportunidad de esperar y así hacer el check in antes de la hora indicada y el día del check out pude dejar las maletas sin ningún problema en el hotel para aprovechar el día.

Tip para llegar: comprar onmicard y desde aeropuerto se toma el JFK Airtrain y por ascensor se llega a la Estación Sutphin Boulevard–Archer Avenue, y en la línea E llegar hasta Roosevelt Avenue donde se cambia a línea F que los deja en 21st Queensbridge (en todas las estaciones hay ascensor, así que no hay problemas con las maletas), caminan 10 minutos y llegan al hotel.
reviews.negatives:
Como sugerencia mi viaje fue de una semana y aunque se que no había refrigerador realmente hizo falta, pues los precios están muy altos y comprar tamaño individual hace que se gaste mucho más, además que esos días hizo mucho calor y todo me quedaba tibio, por lo mismo tampoco pude guardar comidas o postres. Hay una maquina de hielo en el sexto piso y en la habitación una hielera (alcanza a lo más para una bebida individual).

El sector es muy solo durante la noche, así que evitaba llegar pasadas las 10:00 de la noche. 

Hubieron 2 días que llegué a la habitación y la televisión estaba encendida y otro día quedaron los utensilios de limpieza en el baño, quizas a la persona se le olvidó apagar por el apuro.

Están haciendo reparaciones en el sector así que desde las 7:00 am ya se puede escuchar ruido de maquinaria y en la noche se escuchaba el tren que pasa por Queensbridge (pero este último no impedia conciliar el sueño)

reviews.title: Excellent

El personal super amable y a disposición. 
Sirven un desayuno con café/te y croissants.
La ubicación es buena porque estaba 10 min en subte de la zona céntrica de Manhattan. ( La estación está a 3 cuadras aprox).
Hay varios locales de comida cerca y markets.

reviews.negatives: Chambre plus grande

reviews.title: Passable
reviews.positives: Très grand lit, ménage fais tous les jours !
reviews.negatives:
L'emplacement n'etait pas top... Tous les matins et soir pour aller et revenir à l'hôtel, il faut passer par un quartier chaud et c'est pas toujours rassurant en famille ! 
Bon personne ne nous à déranger mais pas toujours top ! 

Puis les murs des chambres son ultraaaa fins ! Ont entends tout ! Ont s'est souvent fais réveiller par des gens qui rentre à 3h du matins...

reviews.title: Agréable mais la propreté est clairement à revoir
reviews.positives: Les pâtisseries gratuites en guise de petit déjeuner c’est bel attention pour les clients.
reviews.negatives: La propreté est clairement à revoir surtout les serviettes tachetées, des cheveux sur les serviettes, cheveux sur les draps, dans la salle de bain, des taches sur le cheveux du lit c’est vraiment pas professionnel du tout.

reviews.title: Avis mitigé.
reviews.positives: Nous avons passez une semaine à deux dans cet hôtel. La localisation est idéale avec le métro à 10 min de Times Square. Le personnel est également l’un des points forts de l’hôtel.
reviews.negatives: Cependant, certaines choses on été plutôt désagréable. Pour commencer, lorsque le ménage était fait, il était fait partiellement (poussière qui restait sur les meubles draps, pas changé, traces de gras sur les fenêtres présente toute la durée de notre séjour). De plus, l’odeur de la lessive utilisée pour les serviettes est vraiment désagréable. Pour finir j’ai fait remonter plusieurs fois dans la semaine, un souci avec le coffre fort qui ne fonctionnait pas. Donc nous ne pourrions pas mettre nos affaires importantes en sécurité. Ce problème n’a pas été réglé durant toute la durée de notre séjour.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: L'aspect général de l'hôtel
reviews.negatives:
La propreté
La manque de rigueur pour tout

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: La propreté des chambres
reviews.negatives: Petit déjeuner plus que décevant. Seulement des petites pâtisseries et les gens se ruent dessus et en prennent énormément donc il ne reste plus rien. L’homme qui regarnissait les pâtisseries les prenaient à mains nue sans gants. Dans la salle de bain il y a une savonnette mais pas de réel gel douche. L’endroit est proche du métro mais à côté d’un quartier social donc pas super sécurisant le soir. La clime dans la chambre ne refroidit pas bien.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
Le personnel est génial, très agréable et à l'écoute .
Le petit dej qui normalement n'était pas prévu et au vu du budget nourriture c'est un plus non négligeable !!
La chambre est top, grande lumineuse , avec frigo placard, le ménage est fait tout les jours , c'est propre ...
Quelques magasins et snacks dans les alentours et métro à 5-10 mins a pieds .
Dans l ensemble c était top
reviews.negatives:
Bémol pour le bruit et la luminosité trop forte qui nous empêchent de faire de longue nuit  ....
Le coin et l' emplacement ne craignent pas vraiment mais disons qu'ils ne sont pas non plus hyper rassurant .

reviews.title: Ich würde dort nicht mehr buchen, da mir das Viertel nicht zusagt und der Preis in keinem Verhältnis steht.
reviews.positives: Zimmer waren sauber und für amerikanische Verhältnisse groß. Blick auf Manhattan. Freundliches Personal überwiegend. Beim Check-in hatten wir eher genervtes Personal, das lag aber wohl eher an dem Mitarbeiter, der eine Diskussion mit anderen Reisenden hatte, die recht anstrengend waren.
reviews.negatives: Die Lage war nicht so gut. Müll auf den Straßen, viele Junkies und Obdachlose. Wir sind immer abends wenn es hell war zum Hotel, weil es uns im Dunkeln nicht geheuer war. Ab vier Uhr morgens Krach von der Straße, da wohl auch Industrieviertel. Die Klimaanlage war laut. Ohne Ohrschutz war schlafen nicht möglich. Da die Wände auch recht hellhörig waren und man andere Reisende hören konnte. Reinigung der Zimmer  auf Nachfrage. Hat bei uns erst nach dem dritten Mal fragen funktioniert, das passte aber dann tadellos. Man läuft bis zur Subway durch ein recht armes Viertel etwa 10 min. Über Tag war es aber kein Problem. Bis nach Manhattan Times Square etwa 25min ab Hotel.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Die Lage wobei man als Frau alleine nicht unterwegs sein sollte. Man ist allerdings sehr schnell in Manhattan.
reviews.negatives: Es waren Bauarbeiten und es war dementsprechend sehr laut. Der Zimmerservice kam spät und wir hatten zu wenig Handtücher

reviews.title: Ganz gut
reviews.positives: Gute Lage. Schöne Zimmer. Fitnessstudio
reviews.negatives: Allgemeine Geräusche von außen auch nachts sehr laut leider.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
Preis-Leistung stimmt. 
Freundliches und hilfsbereites Personal.
Im Zimmer Kaffeemaschine/Wasserkocher vorhanden. Im Speisesaal unten Kaffee, Tee und kleine, süße Stückchen zum Frühstück inkl. 
Getränke-Automat + Mikrowelle 24/7 bereit.
Wir hatten Glück mit unserem Zimmer, aus dem wir die Ed Koch Queensboro Bridge und Roosevelt Island Tram sehen konnten = ♡
reviews.negatives: Geräusche im Fahrstuhl.

reviews.title: Sconsigliato
reviews.positives: La comodità con la metropolitana e a tutte le attrazioni principali.
reviews.negatives:
La reception molto scortese e poco preparata. Ho prenotato e pagato tramite Booking ma al mio arrivo non vedevano il pagamento. Invece di dare supporto, mi hanno costretta a contattare l’assistenza e poi a pagare nuovamente al check in (altrimenti non sarei potuta entrare in stanza). A distanza di 20giorni e tramite assistenza di Booking solo oggi hanno ammesso l’errore e sto aspettando il rimborso.
Inoltre, hotel nuovo ma maleodorante (in stanza c’era puzza di fumo) e tutto rovinato.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Camera piccola ma funzionale ed accogliente
reviews.negatives: Il contesto della zona industriale

reviews.title: Soggiorno a un passo da
reviews.positives: Struttura moderna e ben collegata con Manhattan. Personale cordiale e disponibile. Camera pulita e dotata di tutto il necessario. Letto veramente comodo e servizio colazione a buffet disponibile nella sala relax della struttura.
reviews.negatives: Il cambio giornaliero degli asciugamani e dei saponi a volte non è stato del tutto completo.

reviews.title: Buona alternativa un po fuori dal centro
reviews.positives: Struttura recente e pulita. Staff gentile e disponibile. Nonostante la posizione decentrata, comodo con la metropolitana a 6/7 minuti a piedi.
reviews.negatives: Nel quartiere prestare un po’ di attenzione se si gira da soli, specie nelle ore notturne. Possibilmente passare per le strade principali e non i vicoli.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Posizione vicina alla fermata della metro F che in poche fermate arriva direttamente a Manhattan. Camera accogliente e pulita, staff cortese e disponibile. Zona tranquilla.
reviews.negatives: Nulla di particolare, é stato tutto ok

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
La struttura e lo staff sono stati magnifici. Il cambio biancheria e la pulizia della stanza venivano eseguite quotidianamente. Il phon all’interno della stanza, più precisamente del bagno, è presente in una sacca nera appesa. La colazione è stata piacevolmente gradita: ogni mattina dalle ore 7.00 era presente un gran bel ben di Dio, tutto buonissimo. 
Lo staff ti chiede una cifra di cauzione, pari a 100 dollari, che ti viene subito ridata non appena effettui il check out. 
La metropolitana dista 10/15 minuti dalla struttura ed è molto tranquilla, come anche il quartiere. Il nostro soggiorno è stato eccellente e non potevamo chiedere di meglio, essendo anche fuori Manhattan. Tutto facilmente collegabile e raggiungibile. La consiglierei a chiunque voglia fermarsi a New York, anche di più dei nostri sette giorni.

reviews.title: Zeer onaangenaam
reviews.positives: De kamer was prima
reviews.negatives: Ontbijt was ver onder de maat. Personeel was niet vriendelijk. Locatie voelde zeer onveilig. Liepen zo veel mensen op straat en in de omgeving dat bang voor werd. Vreemde sfeer als naar de metro moest.

En het is op loopafstand van lekkere pizza, roosevelt island kun je heen wandelen.
En de metro ligt ook op loopafstand en dan ben je zo in het stads centrum.
reviews.negatives: de locatie, de omgeving in de avonden kunnen wat onprettig aanvoelen. Het ontbijt is simpel maar prima. het trekt wel een bepaald publiek aan.

reviews.negatives: Het hotel staat in een opkomende buurt, sommige straten kan je beter vermijden overdag maar vooral ‘s avonds. Hygiëne kan beter (vlekken op vloerbedekking en zelfs een sok naast het bed van een vorige gast).

reviews.title: Top verblijf voor de prijs, redelijk goede locatie op de kaart. Directe omgeving wat minder maar prima. Kamer was fijn.

reviews.negatives: Omgeving is industrieel, komt schimmig over. 9 minuten loopafstand naar de F-trein.

reviews.title: Excellent

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: По утрам комплементарно чай кофе и замечательнейшие круассаны! Очень здорово придумано!
reviews.negatives: Очень маленький номер, рабочего места на самом деле практически нет, на столе ноутбук не развернуть толком, а для меня это было важно.

reviews.title: Все хорошо, только вот местоположение незнаю насколько безопасно вечером
reviews.positives: Все компактно
reviews.negatives: Воды не было в номере

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Гостиница чистая, номера уютные, убирают каждый день, приветливый персонал. По утрам сервируют кофе с выпечкой (правда к 8.30 утра уже не остаётся ни выпечки, ни кофе, ни горячей воды),до метро минут 7 пешком. Но есть одно большое "но":  гостиница находится в промзоне и на  рабочей окраине. Вокруг склады, шиномонтаж, здания с выбитыми стеклами, мойки машин и ни одного приличного (или хотя бы безопасного) магазина или кафе, где можно спокойно позавтракать. Очень не комфортно возвращаться вечером (да и в любое другое время суток тоже), потому что по району ошиваются какие-то непонятные личности. Это место точно не для семейного отдыха и не для отдыха одинокой женщины. Лучше доплатить и выбрать жильё в другом месте. Однозначно ещё раз здесь не остановлюсь, несмотря на то, что внутри гостиница не плохая.
reviews.negatives: Расположение гостиницы

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Персонал приветливый и дружелюбный !

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Prljavo, prljavo, prljavo
reviews.negatives: Osoblje ne zna engleski, hotel je neorganizaovan i neuredan. Daleko je stanica metroa. Kraj je jeziv

reviews.title: Not a nice area and you will need to be a heavy sleeper.
reviews.positives: No problem with staff and hotel itself was okay, wasn't notably dirty of anything - But read on...
reviews.negatives: Location was really horrible, pictures are doing alot of heavy lifting to make it look okay. It seems to be a bit of a party hotel, walls are thin and people can be heard coming and going loudly through the night. On a saturday night a car parked outside the hotel played music through a large speaker all night until 9am (yes - 9am in the morning!!!!) making it impossible to sleep. While a roof over your head is always useful, this was an incredibly unpleasent experience and stay.

reviews.title: Value for money however would pay a little more for nicer room, hotel and area
reviews.positives: Good value, comfy beds, near subway and only a few stops from Central Park.
reviews.negatives: Area around quite run down, windows in room had a draft, room near lift so very noise at night. Breakfast limited.

reviews.title: Disappointing. Expensive for what it was.
reviews.negatives: The area did not feel safe, furniture scratched and I did not find the staff very helpful.

reviews.title: Okay.
reviews.positives: Great location in regard to the city. Doesn’t feel 100% safe of a night time. Just opted to uber than subway.
reviews.negatives: Cleanliness. Towels were dirty at time. Room didn’t feel 100% clean and shower was at the standard of a hostel shared bathroom

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: We didn’t feel safe in the neighbourhood and end up getting ubers everywhere

reviews.title: A good stay
reviews.positives: The room had a good quality, and the staff was helpful. The price was nice, although I can see where it comes from (see negatives).
reviews.negatives: The hotel is undergoing reconstruction, so be prepared for some inconvenience. Also, the surroundings (close to the factory and Queensbridge Housing) might be also a bit 'surprising' (although the area is generally safe), so please take a closer look before booking so you are not surprised.

reviews.title: It was a fair stay
reviews.positives: Clean and near to the train to everywhere
reviews.negatives: Morning complementary. Specially the coffee was not good at all. And had to wait about 20 minutes at the reception as the receptionist was on the phone.

reviews.title: Lovely staff. Good location.
reviews.positives: The property was spacious compared to other properties I have stayed at. The staff was also very accommodating and responded to all our queries aptly including a request for a room change.
reviews.negatives: The streets around the property are poorly lit at night and make it daunting to come back late into the night.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: It was good

reviews.title: Value for money
reviews.positives: Value for money and fairly clean
reviews.negatives: The location

reviews.title: Nice stay, good hotel, would recommend.
reviews.positives: Good hotel, about 10 minutes from Metro. Clean, cozy, quiet part of Queens. I would stay there again. Good value hotel.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: I have mixed feelings about the hotel. The rooms are nice and new, but that’s about it.
reviews.negatives:
The biggest issue was the room cleaning. We were told that cleaning is done every day. Our room was cleaned only on the first day, and for the next four days, it wasn’t cleaned at all. When we ran into the cleaning lady and asked her to clean our room, she refused and said, “tomorrow.” She only said that because a different cleaning lady would be there the next day—who also wouldn’t have cleaned the room unless we explicitly asked her.

Another negative aspect was the shampoo and shower gel. It’s very impractical to provide everything in tiny bottles. We had 7 bottles of hair shampoo in the bathroom and exactly 0 for body wash! When we asked the cleaning lady for body gel, she didn’t even know what it was, as no one there speaks English.

Some of the pillows in our room had a very strange smell.

The location is rather odd and there are lots of “zombies” around the area—we didn’t exactly feel in danger, but it wasn’t entirely safe either. However, there are many hotels nearby, so there are also quite a few tourists.

I don’t know. I might come back if the issues I’ve described were fixed.

reviews.title: Nice hotel
reviews.positives: The bed, room and bathroom were comfortable and the staff was very accommodating and friendly, and the view was nice.
reviews.negatives:
Although the rooms and general areas were very clean, the staircases would often contain garbage bags, one day even a smelly puddle of garbage leakage along several of them. Probably most guests won't use the staircase, so it won't affect your stay. However, I would advise the manager to reconsider fire safety. One of the bags had been there for a couple of days. Appart from this In would rate the hotel 10/10 clean.

I would also suggest to turn off the loud beep in the elevator.

The gym is some cardio devices, a whimsical bench and dumbles. It's better than nothing, but not by a lot.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Good location, close to metro station. Good value to standard.

reviews.title: Above all is a good place to stay and enjoy Manhattan. The area is not fancy but works well.
reviews.positives: The hotel is good, 25 minutes by train to Manhattan. An easy walk (8-10 minutes) from the hotel to the train station. The breakfast was basic (just carbs). The staff is very attentive, they let me to check in early that was very helpful.
reviews.negatives: I would suggest to improve a little the breakfast, maybe adding eggs, ham and bread. Also, the hotel is located in an industrial area, then, early morning there were trucks downloading materials (ex.flour) which makes a lot of noise.

reviews.title: All good
reviews.positives: Got everything I need: clean room, fridge, airco, decent location and helpful staff.
reviews.negatives: Breakfast, wouldn’t really call it breakfast but there is a good deli nearby

reviews.title: Value for money
reviews.positives: Cleanliness and value for money
reviews.negatives: Location

reviews.title: Great rooms, friendly staff
reviews.positives: Clean rooms
reviews.negatives: The neighborhood was not very pleasant, not recommending for female solo travelers

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The hotel is OK, it has pretty much everything you would expect. They will clean your room everyday and make you feel as comfortable as possible
reviews.negatives: I did not like the single-glass windows in my room. The neighborhood is quite noisy (like really noisy) and it was impossible to sleep without earplugs. They have a fitness room, but it barely has any equipment.

reviews.title: Good price, nice room, nice personal, medium location
reviews.positives: Good price, nice people, clean and comfortable room. It’s 10 min walking to the subway and in less than 30 min you can be in Manhattan.
reviews.negatives: The neighborhood doesn’t look clean and safe, but in my opinion it was safe (I saw police there many times). One day the subway was not working and that is a risk of staying in this hotel; in the end we just lost 1 hour because we took another direction of the subway, but it’s risky to have just one subway close to your hotel.

reviews.title: Clean and comfortable rooms with a bit of spiciness
reviews.positives: The hotel was clean and the rooms were comfortable and spacious. Nothing bad to say about the hotel itself. As a bonus, we had complimentary breakfast which was very welcomed (some pastries and coffee, but enough to kickstart your day).
reviews.negatives: The hotel is a "hood". There is no bigger grocery stores, but only some local shops that looks shady and were there are a lot of dubious people (and there is a lot of "smoke" smell). We used uber during the night to reach the hotel just to be safe and we did our shopping during the day to be safe. Overall, nothing really happened, but it gives a bit of vibes of a "in the hood" movie.

reviews.title: Great for a short trip
reviews.positives: Very clean and new, free light breakfast.
reviews.negatives: Location isn’t ideal for all, but only a few minutes to the regular subway to Manhattan.

reviews.title: Good quality hotel at affordable price!
reviews.positives: The facilities are clean and well equipped. The room had all the necessary amenities. The hotel is 5 minutes walk from a subway station and only 2 stops away from Manhattan. The complementary pastries and coffee in the morning are a really nice touch. The best asset of the hotel are the staff! They are all very helpful, polite and accommodating!
reviews.negatives:
The location in which it sits is quite rough (close to the biggest housing project in the US). But, then again, if you’re not too picky that’s the price to pay to get a very good hotel at affordable prices in NYC! 
One last note is regarding the beeping of the lifts at each floor. While I understand it’s a requirement under US law, the volume is really loud and it resonates through the corridors and into the rooms. I would recommend adjusting the volume so that it is audible in the lift but not so much outside of it.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: No one cleane my room, but maybe I should have asked, but normally you expect that it will be cleane.

reviews.title: I’ve spent best time at this hotel. Very comfy, great view, close to the subway to manhattan. Highly recommend
reviews.positives: Clean, very spacious. Amazing stuff.

reviews.title: A recommendable facility   and the staff were friendly and offered services generously.
reviews.positives: The complimentary coffee every morning with a variety of snacks was superb. However, consider extending the period of serving.
reviews.negatives: Cleaning of rooms and replenishing of the toiletries should be done regularly not upon request. What I didn't like was the aspect of the holding fee of USD 100 which was to be released upon check out. To date, that  amount is yet to be received on my end.

reviews.title: Great value for money
reviews.positives: Comfy bed

reviews.title: Nedia was a nice comfortable stay. Staff was nice and the hotel was very clean.
reviews.positives: Location, very easy to get around the city.
reviews.negatives: It was a shame there wasn't a hot breakfast available.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: no fridge but clean room

reviews.title: Great location, no fuss hotel.
reviews.positives: Gave me a free upgrade to a larger room
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Not bad value for money

Room was clean and had everything

coffee and pastries were tasty and were a nice touch

gym has v limited equipment but it’s good quality for what you pay
reviews.negatives:
location is the biggest downside - it’s in a weird industrial area but the metros a 10 min walk

‘City view’ claim was a bit rich

reviews.title: I would definetly stay here again
reviews.positives: The value i got for the price was really good. It eas close to subway station that runs a line to many touristic attractions.
reviews.negatives: Not that I didn’t like but the neighbourhood could look dangerous for those who lives in very safe countries.

reviews.title: Excellent for our needs, we shall return
reviews.positives: Close to where we were visiting family. Really big rooms, clean, good bathroom
reviews.negatives: The area outside the hotel was a bit run down & smelled of cannabis.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Everything was very good, the service and the room.

reviews.title: Would choose it again!
reviews.positives: The staff is kind and welcoming and the room was clean and comfortable. It only takes 10-12 minutes walking to reach the subway stop. We would choose this hotel again for our 5 days trip to NY.
reviews.negatives: The area is convenient (few subway stops from Manhattan) but doesn’t feel the most safe at night. However we didn’t have any issue.

reviews.title: Nice hotel due to cleanliness
reviews.positives: The break fast should be more better
reviews.negatives: Net and clean

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Very close to the subway. 3 stops and you are in Manhattan. Around the hotel many places to eat.

reviews.title: Great, wish it was next to the subway to be perfect
reviews.positives: Staff and high cleanliness
reviews.negatives: The surrounding homes

reviews.title: Good to visit Manhattan, 2 stops away.
reviews.positives:
-Great location, 2 stops from times square.
-price for value
-clean
-close to metro entrance. 
-they also kept out luggage when we had to check out. Super good treatment.
reviews.negatives: -neighbourhood is a bit sketchy, you can see some people repairing cars on the street and some garbage, but didn't have any issues, maybe someone can talk to you but I didn't feel bad.  So, don't worry about that.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Clean, nice beds, free coffee and crossaints in the morning, friendly and helpful staff

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Gostei mesmo so do pão sem custo do café da manhã. Pão , água e café são grátis pela mancha. Horário pessimo de café da manhã de 7 às 9AM
reviews.negatives: Metro não é perto é área é perigosa!

reviews.title: Boa com ressalvas
reviews.positives: O hotel é novo, sendo assim os quartos são grandes, confortáveis e com ótimo chuveiro.
reviews.negatives: O hotel fica num bairro industrial, então a noite é bem isolado de movimento e não tem muitos locais de alimentação próximos. O café da manhã é o básico: uns pãezinhos doces e café. Não gostei do fato de que o café era servido até as 9h, mas as vezes eram 8:30, já não tinha mais nada e não era reposto.

reviews.negatives: O café da manhã é bem simples. Apenas servem croissants e folhados. Não há opções de frutas ou queijos. Também achei a localização um pouco estranha, um bairro industrial e cheio de moradores de rua.
